papers.title: Multiple pathways to radical service innovation in manufacturing firms: a fuzzy-set analysis within digital innovation ecosystems
papers.abstract: Survey of 493 manufacturing firms using fuzzy-set QCA explores configurations of six factors influencing radical service innovation. Five configurational patterns identified; digital integrative capability (DIC) emerges as core condition in most patterns. Results highlight that no single factor is sufficient alone; instead, combinations of digital integrative capability, organizational ambidexterity, strategic flexibility, customer co-creation, knowledge absorption, and ecosystem embeddedness determine radical service innovation outcomes.
papers.summary_ja: 493社の製造業を対象にfsQCAを用いて急進的サービスイノベーションを引き起こす要因配置を解明。デジタル統合ケイパビリティ（DIC）が中核条件として機能し、組織アンビデクスタリティ・戦略的柔軟性・顧客共創・知識吸収・エコシステム埋め込みとの5つの組み合わせパターンを特定。製造業のサービタイゼーション戦略の実行条件を実証した。

papers.title: Adaptability in Innovation Management: A Meta-Analysis
papers.abstract: Multi-level meta-analysis of 549 effect sizes from 268 independent samples reveals an overall positive relationship between adaptability and innovation. The adaptability-innovation relationship is most pronounced when all attributes of adaptability (flexibility, reactivity, proactivity, and speed) are present. Moderation analyses show that the relationship is stronger in high-uncertainty environments and in firms with higher levels of organizational learning. The meta-analysis provides robust evidence that adaptability is a critical driver of innovation performance across organizational levels.
papers.summary_ja: 268独立サンプル・549効果量のメタ分析により、適応性とイノベーション成果の全般的正の関係を実証。柔軟性・反応性・先制性・スピードの4属性が揃う場合に効果が最大化し、不確実性の高い環境下でさらに増幅することを明らかにした。イノベーション管理における適応性構築の優先度と方向性に強力なエビデンスを提供。

papers.title: Advancing Circularity: The Dynamic Capabilities to Drive Transformative Change
papers.abstract: Firms must develop advanced dynamic capabilities to accelerate sustainable development towards more circular business systems. Drawing on dynamic capabilities for circularity, we illustrate how organizations can extend transitional approaches to sustainability towards more transformative business practices. We propose a Circularity Transformation Framework distinguishing three modes: transitional (incremental improvement within existing systems), transformational (systemic redesign of value chains), and regenerative (net-positive contribution to ecological and social systems). Each mode requires distinct dynamic capabilities: sensing, seizing, and reconfiguring capabilities adapted to circular economy imperatives.
papers.summary_ja: サーキュラーエコノミーへの移行を推進するダイナミックケイパビリティを3段階（移行的・変革的・再生的）で体系化したCMR論文。各モードで必要なセンシング・シージング・再構成ケイパビリティを特定し、企業が段階的にサーキュラリティを深化させるための変革フレームワークを提示。長期の社会インフラ・脱炭素ロードマップ設計に直結する枠組み。

papers.title: Organisational culture, business model design and performance: Does ambidexterity play a role?
papers.abstract: This study demonstrates that new business model design can capture the value created by organisational culture and innovation ambidexterity. A chain relationship was found between ambidextrous organisational culture, innovation ambidexterity, novel business models, and business performance. Structural equation modeling on survey data from 287 firms shows that ambidextrous culture positively shapes innovation ambidexterity, which in turn enables novel business model design, ultimately improving performance. The findings underscore the central role of ambidexterity as a mediating bridge linking culture to performance through business model innovation.
papers.summary_ja: 287社のSEMデータにより「アンビデクストラスな組織文化→イノベーション・アンビデクスタリティ→新規ビジネスモデル設計→業績」という連鎖関係を実証。ビジネスモデル設計がアンビデクスタリティの価値を結晶化させる媒介役であることを明らかにし、組織文化変革とビジネスモデルイノベーションの統合戦略に理論的根拠を提供。

papers.title: Transforming Health Systems: A Systemic Design Lab Approach to Integrated Care
papers.abstract: The Systemic Design Lab (SDL) at Khoo Teck Puat Hospital applies system-thinking and design-thinking to address complex healthcare issues. Participants engage in five experiential zones to foster cross-team collaboration and develop innovative integrated care solutions. The SDL combines systems mapping, stakeholder journey analysis, rapid prototyping, and reflective facilitation to enable frontline clinicians and administrators to co-design systemic interventions. Results from three years of operation demonstrate measurable improvements in cross-departmental collaboration and solution implementation rates.
papers.summary_ja: シンガポールの病院に設置した「システミックデザインラボ（SDL）」が、システム思考とデザイン思考を5ゾーン体験形式で統合し、複雑な医療課題に対する部門横断的な統合ケアソリューションを共創するアプローチを紹介。3年の運用実績から、部門横断協働と解決策実装率の定量的改善を実証した事例研究。

papers.title: Cross-sectoral transition work at the heart of the regime: Transforming incumbent systems in utility infrastructure planning in Amsterdam
papers.abstract: This article examines a cross-sectoral transition programme in Amsterdam involving municipality, water company, and energy grid operator. Three strategies are identified for regime-embedded actors engaged in cross-sectoral transition work: boundary spanning (bridging different sectoral logics), institutional entrepreneurship (modifying shared rules and norms), and protective space creation (shielding experimental collaborations from incumbent pressures). The study contributes to transition theory by demonstrating that regime actors themselves can initiate and sustain cross-sectoral change.
papers.summary_ja: アムステルダムの市・水道会社・電力グリッド事業者による都市インフラ計画の跨セクター移行プログラムを分析し、レジーム埋め込み型アクターが用いる3戦略（境界連結・制度的起業家活動・保護空間創出）を特定。既存システム内部の変革主体がどのように社会技術移行を主導できるかを示す、インフラ企業向けの移行戦略論。

papers.title: Anticipatory governance of a maritime mission using a real-time mission-oriented transition assessment
papers.abstract: Anticipatory governance supports mission-oriented innovation policy by identifying, mitigating, and preparing for barriers. This study applies a real-time Mission-Oriented Transition Assessment to yield longitudinal insights in the Dutch maritime mission 'Climate neutral shipping by 2050'. Using mixed methods combining expert interviews, workshop data, and policy document analysis, the study maps transition barriers across technical, market, regulatory, and social dimensions, and demonstrates how anticipatory governance enables proactive barrier management.
papers.summary_ja: 「2050年気候中立船舶」を目指すオランダ海事ミッションにリアルタイムのミッション指向トランジションアセスメントを適用し、先見的ガバナンスが技術・市場・規制・社会の各バリアを事前に特定・軽減するプロセスを解明。ミッション指向イノベーション政策の実践知を提供する縦断的事例研究。

papers.title: Creative Mode of Professional Architect/Designer Working with GenAI
papers.journal: The International Journal of Design Education
papers.abstract: Study of 15 professional architects/designers using GenAI text-to-image (TTI) tools. Three creative modes identified: Co-visualize (using GenAI as a visualization tool to externalize existing ideas), Co-wander (using GenAI as an experimental medium for open-ended exploration), and Co-synthesis (engaging GenAI as a creative partner to foster complex ideation in ambiguous conceptual spaces). The research maps how designers' expertise and intentionality shape which mode they adopt, and how each mode affects design outcomes and creative agency.
papers.summary_ja: 15名のプロ建築家・デザイナーによるGenAI（テキスト→画像）ツール活用の質的研究。3つの創造的モード「共同可視化（アイデア外在化）」「共同逍遥（探索的実験）」「共同統合（複雑な概念空間での共創）」を特定し、デザイナーの専門性と意図性がモード選択に影響することを解明。デザイン実務でのGenAI活用指針として即実践可能な知見。

papers.title: AI as an architect: exploring the enablers of regenerative innovation ecosystems in creative industries
papers.abstract: AI significantly influences development of regenerative innovation ecosystems by enhancing environmental sustainability, promoting resource optimization and enabling self-learning business models. Survey of 110 representatives from creative industry organizations across five European countries. Structural equation modeling identifies AI adoption as a key enabler of regenerative ecosystem formation, with organizational learning culture and digital infrastructure as critical boundary conditions.
papers.summary_ja: 欧州5カ国110名のクリエイティブ産業組織を対象にSEMを用いて、AIが再生型イノベーションエコシステムの形成を促進するメカニズムを解明。AI導入が環境持続可能性・資源最適化・自己学習型ビジネスモデルを通じてエコシステムを進化させる条件（組織学習文化・デジタルインフラ）を特定。

papers.title: Functional pretence: what makes humans designers - a foundational perspective for design and design education
papers.journal: International Journal of Technology and Design Education
papers.abstract: Synthesizing anthropology, cognitive science, and developmental psychology, this paper proposes 'functional pretence' as the intentional process enabling humans to interact with imagined states as grounds for real action—the foundational capacity enabling all design. Functional pretence involves treating non-existent or hypothetical states as real in order to act upon them. This capacity is argued to be uniquely human and to underlie all designerly cognition, including envisioning, prototyping, scenario-building, and speculative design. Implications for design education and AI-assisted design are discussed.
papers.summary_ja: 人類学・認知科学・発達心理学を統合し、「機能的見立て（functional pretence）＝想像上の状態を実在するものとして扱い行動する能力」を全デザイン行為の基盤的認知能力として提唱。ビジョニング・プロトタイピング・シナリオ構築・スペキュラティブデザインの認知的根拠を統一的に説明する概念枠組みであり、AI時代のデザイン教育・人間固有の価値再定義にも示唆を持つ。
